description: Recruitment graphic for ICE's Office of the Principal Legal Advisor (OPLA) virtual job fair. The upper two-thirds is a warm, golden, softly-lit image of a bronze blindfolded Lady Justice statue holding aloft the scales of justice in her right hand, with a billowing American flag across the upper-left of the frame and a sunlit window in the background; the palette is gold and orange. The lower third is a dark navy band with centered white serif text: 'Join us at our virtual job fair.' and a large 'November 20' with the times '11 a.m. - 1 p.m. or 5 p.m. - 7 p.m.' to its right. The bottom left shows the DHS seal and 'ICE | Office of the Principal Legal Advisor'; the bottom right reads 'ICE.gov/careers' in gold serif. The tweet lists hiring cities for OPLA general attorney roles.
notable_text: Join us at our virtual job fair. November 20; 11 a.m. - 1 p.m. or 5 p.m. - 7 p.m.; ICE Office of the Principal Legal Advisor; ICE.gov/careers
